---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    smooth-scroll: true
    title-block-banner: false
---

```{=html}
<style>

@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');

/* ===== GLOBAL ===== */
body{
  background:#f4f6f5;
  font-family:'Inter', sans-serif;
  color:#1f2937;
}

main.content{
  max-width:1100px;
  padding-top:8px !important;
}

/* ===== NAVBAR (AYNI) ===== */
.navbar{
  background:#163a2d !important;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}

.navbar-brand,
.navbar a{
  color:#f9fafb !important;
  font-weight:500;
  font-size:0.95rem;
}

.navbar a:hover{
  color:#d1fae5 !important;
}

/* ===== HERO (AYNI) ===== */
.hero{
  background:#1f4d3a;
  color:white;
  padding:80px 65px;
  border-radius:18px;
  margin-bottom:18px;
}

.hero h1{
  font-size:4.2rem;
  font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:-2px;
  line-height:0.95;
}

.hero-subtitle{
  color:#d1fae5;
  font-size:0.92rem;
  font-weight:600;
  letter-spacing:1.8px;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-bottom:22px;
}

.hero p{
  max-width:700px;
  font-size:1.02rem;
  line-height:1.85;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,0.88);
  margin:0;
}

/* ===== GRID (SADECE DÜZENLEME) ===== */
.grid{
  row-gap:14px;
  column-gap:14px;
}

/* ===== CARDS ===== */
.card-box,
.feature,
.stats{
  background:white;
  border-radius:16px;
  padding:22px;
  border:1px solid #e5e7eb;
  height:100%;
  box-sizing:border-box;
}

/* başlık */
.card-box h3,
.feature h3{
  font-size:1.08rem;
  font-weight:600;
  color:#163a2d;
  margin-bottom:12px;
}

/* text */
.card-box p,
.feature p,
.card-box li{
  color:#4b5563;
  line-height:1.7;
}

/* stats */
.stats{
  text-align:center;
}

.stats h2{
  font-size:2.3rem;
  font-weight:700;
  color:#163a2d;
  margin-bottom:5px;
}

/* ===== SPACING ===== */
.spacer{
  height:12px;
}

/* ===== FOOTER ===== */
.footer{
  margin-top:20px;
  text-align:center;
  color:#6b7280;
  font-size:0.9rem;
}

.footer strong{
  color:#163a2d;
}

/* === TIMELINE + CONTRIBUTORS KÜÇÜLT === */

/* Feature bloklarını genel olarak biraz kompakt yap */
.feature{
  padding:20px 22px !important;
}

/* Timeline tablo daha sıkı */
.feature table{
  font-size:0.92rem;
}

.feature th,
.feature td{
  padding:6px 8px !important;
  line-height:1.4;
}

/* Contributors bölümü metin sıkılığı */
.feature strong{
  font-size:0.98rem;
}

.feature br{
  line-height:1.2;
}

/* Eğer bu iki blok arası boşluk fazlaysa */
.feature + .feature{
  margin-top:10px !important;
}
</style>

<div class="hero">

<div class="hero-subtitle">
EMU430 • PROJECT PHASE 1
</div>

# Decoding Higher Education

<p>
A Trend Analysis of Industrial Engineering Programs in Turkey
</p>

</div>

<!-- ===================== SECTION 1 ===================== -->
<div class="grid">

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<div class="card-box">

### Project Objective

This project investigates Industrial Engineering departments in Turkey (2018–2025).

We analyze how academic capacity, region, demand, and mobility affect success.

</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<div class="card-box">

### Problem Statement

University ranking data exists, but explanations are limited.

This project focuses on *why* some departments perform better over time.

</div>
:::

</div>

<div class="spacer"></div>

<!-- ===================== STATS ===================== -->
<div class="grid">

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
<div class="stats">
<h2>2018–2025</h2>
<p>Time Span</p>
</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
<div class="stats">
<h2>R</h2>
<p>Main Tool</p>
</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
<div class="stats">
<h2>Quarto</h2>
<p>Reporting</p>
</div>
:::

</div>

<div class="spacer"></div>

<!-- ===================== FEATURES ===================== -->
<div class="grid">

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<div class="feature">

### Data Strategy

- YÖK Atlas
- R datasets
- Multi-year IE data
- Mobility indicators

</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<div class="feature">

### Methodology

- Data cleaning
- EDA
- Correlation analysis
- Visualization
- Reporting in Quarto

</div>
:::

</div>

<div class="spacer"></div>

<!-- ===================== TABLE ===================== -->
<div class="feature">

### Timeline

| Phase | Work |
|------|------|
| 1–2 | Data preparation |
| 3–4 | Analysis |
| 5 | Reporting |

</div>

<div class="spacer"></div>

<!-- ===================== CONTRIBUTORS ===================== -->
<div class="feature">

### Contributors

<strong>Yusuf Bora Çavdar</strong>  
Data analysis & visualization  

<strong>Onur Furkan Gök</strong>  
Research & methodology  

</div>

<div class="footer">
Built with <strong>R</strong> and <strong>Quarto</strong>
</div>
